name: Gulbahar Embroidered Lawn
description: Exquisite 3-piece lawn suit adorned with intricate floral embroidery on the shirt. Features delicate thread work on dupatta borders and printed cambric trousers. Perfect for summer evenings and casual gatherings.

name: Zardozi Bridal Lehenga
description: Magnificent bridal lehenga crafted from pure silk with hand-applied zardozi and dabka work. The heavily embellished blouse and layered lehenga skirt make this a statement piece for your special day.

name: Karandi Winter Shawl Suit
description: Luxurious karandi fabric suit with a matching wool shawl featuring intricate woven patterns. The straight-cut shirt with digital print and embellished neckline pairs perfectly with the heavy shawl dupatta.

name: Chikankari Formal Kurta
description: Elegant chikankari kurta in fine cotton voile with all-over white-on-white embroidery. This semi-formal piece features a classic A-line silhouette with delicate sequin detailing on the collar and hem.

name: Digital Print Chiffon Saree
description: Stunning chiffon saree with vibrant digital print featuring floral and geometric motifs. Comes with a fully stitched embroidered blouse. The lightweight fabric drapes beautifully for formal dinners and evening events.

name: Shamoz Silk Eid Collection
description: Breathtaking shamoz silk suit from our exclusive Eid collection. Features 3D floral embellishments on the shirt, a heavily embroidered dupatta, and wide-leg trousers in matching silk. The epitome of festive luxury.

name: Cotton Printed Casual Suit
description: Comfortable and stylish 3-piece cotton suit for everyday wear. Vibrant block print design with complementary plain dupatta and trouser. Easy to maintain and perfect for casual outings and family gatherings.

name: Velvet Embroidered Shawl
description: Opulent velvet shawl with hand-embroidered paisley motifs in gold and silver threads. This versatile piece can be worn as a dupatta or wrap. Perfect for winter weddings and formal occasions.
